response.justification: Bogdan is a strong match for this role, bringing 15+ years of progressive full-stack experience with a current TypeScript/Node.js focus that directly aligns with the primary stack. His current position at re:cinq explicitly covers AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework development, satisfying a differentiating requirement. He demonstrates a deep, genuine testing culture through TDD practice, open-source testing tooling, and community workshops. The main gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js experience, no mention of Vitest (though testing depth is evident), and Kotlin/Java limited to roles from 2016–2018.
strengths: Production-scale TypeScript/Node.js across multiple senior roles, including high-throughput systems handling millions of requests per second
Current hands-on AI agent and MCP (Model Context Protocol) infrastructure work at re:cinq, directly matching the AI agent development requirement
Proven, deeply ingrained testing culture: TDD practitioner, authored D-language testing frameworks, and ran community TDD/refactoring workshops
concerns: No mention of Nest.js in any role or project, despite it being the primary backend framework for this position
Vitest is absent from the resume; testing framework alignment with the specified stack is unclear
Kotlin/Java experience is confined to roles from 2016–2018 and appears to have been abandoned, which is a gap for secondary backend services
